## Checklist

- [ ] Spec exists in `docs/specs/` and acceptance criteria are referenced above
- [ ] All tests are green (`npm test`)
- [ ] Coverage thresholds pass (`npm run test:cov`)
- [ ] No architectural boundary violations (`npm run arch:check`)
- [ ] `## Current State` in `CLAUDE.md` updated if a slice moved to GREEN
- [ ] `docs/architecture.md` updated if a new endpoint was added
- [ ] Commits follow conventional format and include co-author trailer where applicable
